add-text-field.title: Add Text Field to PDF Page
add-text-field.description: Demonstrates adding a text form field named CustomerName to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-checkbox-field.title: Insert Checkbox Field on PDF Page
insert-checkbox-field.description: Demonstrates how to add an unchecked checkbox field named 'AgreeTerms' to page 2 of an existing PDF document.

add-radio-button-group.title: Add Radio Button Group to PDF Page
add-radio-button-group.description: Creates a PDF with three pages and adds a radio button group named "PaymentMethod" with "Credit" and "PayPal" options on the third page.

add-submit-button.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button.description: Demonstrates adding a submit button named 'SubmitForm' to page 1 of a PDF that posts form data to a specified URL.

add-js-alert-to-push-button.title: Add JavaScript Alert to Push Button in PDF Form
add-js-alert-to-push-button.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript alert to a push button named "ShowInfo" in an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

decorate-pdf-form-field.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Custom Appearance
decorate-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to change the border color, background shade, and font style of a specific form field using FormEditor.

apply-default-decoration-text-fields.title: Apply Default Decoration to All Text Fields
apply-default-decoration-text-fields.description: Demonstrates how to set a default visual style for all text fields in a PDF using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

set-field-alignment-center.title: Set PDF Form Field Alignment to Center
set-field-alignment-center.description: Demonstrates how to set the horizontal alignment of a PDF form field named "Address" to center using FormEditor.SetFieldAlignment.

assign-custom-attribute-to-pdf-form-fiel.title: Assign Custom Attribute to PDF Form Field
assign-custom-attribute-to-pdf-form-fiel.description: Demonstrates how to locate a form field, set a standard attribute with FormEditor, and add a custom key‑value pair to the field's PDF dictionary.

set-field-limit-quantity.title: Set Numeric Limit for PDF Form Field
set-field-limit-quantity.description: Demonstrates how to restrict the Quantity field to a maximum of three characters (allowing values 1‑100) using FormEditor.SetFieldLimit.

add-list-item-dropdown.title: Add List Item to Dropdown Field in PDF
add-list-item-dropdown.description: Demonstrates adding a new option "Option A" to an existing dropdown field named "Choices" on page 4 of a PDF form.

delete-list-item.title: Delete List Item from PDF Form Field
delete-list-item.description: Removes the list option "Option B" from the list field "Choices" on page 4 of a PDF form.

copy-inner-field.title: Copy Inner PDF Form Field Content
copy-inner-field.description: Copies the content of an existing form field to another field within the same PDF using FormEditor.

copy-form-field-definition.title: Copy Form Field Definition to New Field on Specific Page
copy-form-field-definition.description: Demonstrates copying an existing AcroForm field definition to a new field named 'ClonedField' on page 5 using FormEditor.

move-pdf-form-field.title: Move PDF Form Field to New Position
move-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates moving an existing form field to a new location on a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-pdf-form-field.title: Remove a PDF Form Field
remove-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to delete an unused form field named "ObsoleteField" from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to rename a form field throughout a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

add-email-validation-js.title: Add Email Validation JavaScript to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-js.description: Demonstrates adding JavaScript to the "Email" form field to validate the email format when the field loses focus.

export-pdf-form-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to FDF
export-pdf-form-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to export all form fields from a PDF document to an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

import-form-fields-xfdf.title: Import Form Fields from XFDF into PDF
import-form-fields-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to import AcroForm field values from an XFDF file into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-processeddate-field.title: Batch Add Hidden ProcessedDate Field to PDFs
batch-add-processeddate-field.description: Iterates over all PDF files in the InputForms folder, adds (or fills) a hidden field named ProcessedDate with a new GUID, and saves the PDFs.

decorate-checkbox-fields.title: Decorate Checkbox Fields in PDFs
decorate-checkbox-fields.description: Applies a consistent visual decoration to all checkbox fields in each PDF file within a directory.

update-submit-button-url.title: Update Submit Button URLs in PDF Batch
update-submit-button-url.description: Iterates over PDF files, retrieves submit button names, and updates each button's URL to a new address using Aspose.Pdf.FormEditor.

clear-populate-dropdown.title: Clear and Populate Dropdown List in PDF
clear-populate-dropdown.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing items from a dropdown (list box) field and add new values using Aspose.Pdf.

add-country-list-items.title: Add 195 Countries to List Box in PDF Form
add-country-list-items.description: Demonstrates how to populate a PDF form list box named CountryList with all country names using FormEditor.AddListItem in a loop.

set-field-readonly-currency.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only and Format as Currency
set-field-readonly-currency.description: Demonstrates how to make a form field read‑only and apply a currency format using FormEditor and Form classes.

add-js-clear-field-on-focus.title: Add JavaScript to Clear a Form Field on Focus
add-js-clear-field-on-focus.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that clears its content when the field receives focus.

copy-form-fields.title: Copy Form Field Definitions from Template to Target PDF
copy-form-fields.description: Demonstrates copying all AcroForm field definitions from a template PDF to another PDF using FormEditor.

move-form-fields.title: Move All Form Fields by Offset
move-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to shift every form field in a PDF by a fixed offset using FormEditor.

batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.title: Batch Rename PDF Form Fields with Prefix
batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.description: Renames all form fields that start with "Old_" to "New_" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form class.

set-multiline-text-field.title: Set Multiline Property for PDF Text Field
set-multiline-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to enable multiline input for a text field named 'Comments' in an existing PDF form.

set-signature-field-border.title: Set Signature Field Border Thickness
set-signature-field-border.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom border thickness of 2 points for a signature form field using SetFieldAttribute.

set-field-background-color.title: Set Background Color of PDF Form Field
set-field-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to change the background color of a specific form field to light green using Aspose.Pdf FormEditor.

add-hidden-sessionid-field.title: Add Hidden SessionId Field to PDFs in Batch
add-hidden-sessionid-field.description: Adds a hidden form field named SessionId with a generated GUID to each PDF file in the current directory.

attach-js-validation-submit-button.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to PDF Submit Button
attach-js-validation-submit-button.description: Demonstrates adding JavaScript to a PDF submit button that checks required fields before submitting the form.

export-form-fields-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-form-fields-json.description: Exports all form field definitions from a PDF document to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-pdf-form-fields-json.title: Import PDF Form Fields from JSON
import-pdf-form-fields-json.description: Creates a new PDF document and imports form field definitions from a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-field-limit.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Field
set-field-limit.description: Demonstrates how to set the maximum character length of a PDF form field using FormEditor.SetFieldLimit.

change-date-field-format.title: Change Date Field Format in PDF Form
change-date-field-format.description: Loads a PDF, finds a form field named 'Date', and sets its display format to MM/dd/yyyy.

add-reset-form-button.title: Add Reset Form Push Button to PDF
add-reset-form-button.description: Demonstrates adding a push button named "ResetForm" to a PDF that clears all form fields when clicked.

restrict-score-field.title: Restrict Score Field to Integer 0‑100 in PDF Form
restrict-score-field.description: Shows how to limit a PDF form field named "Score" to accept only integer values between 0 and 100 using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

attach-javascript-age-field.title: Attach JavaScript Warning to Age Field
attach-javascript-age-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that shows a warning when the entered age is less than 18.

copy-image-field-content.title: Copy Image Field Content to Another Field in PDF
copy-image-field-content.description: Demonstrates copying the inner content of an image form field named "Logo" to a new image field "HeaderLogo" within the same PDF using FormEditor.

remove-empty-form-field.title: Remove Empty PDF Form Field
remove-empty-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to delete a form field named "TempField" only when it contains no user-entered data.

rename-pdf-form-fields.title: Rename PDF Form Fields Using CSV Mapping
rename-pdf-form-fields.description: Renames form fields in a PDF according to a CSV mapping file.

add-digital-signature-field.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-digital-signature-field.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF, setting its default appearance, and applying a digital signature using a certificate.

set-field-required.title: Set PDF Form Field to Required with Asterisk Indicator
set-field-required.description: Demonstrates how to mark a form field as required and display the asterisk indicator using FormEditor.SetFieldAttribute.

apply-custom-font-to-text-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All Text Fields in PDF
apply-custom-font-to-text-fields.description: Demonstrates how to set the "Arial Bold" font for every text field in a PDF using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

batch-add-checkbox.title: Batch Add Checkbox Field to PDFs
batch-add-checkbox.description: Adds a 'SelectAll' checkbox to the first page of each PDF in a folder and saves the modified files.

attach-javascript-to-field.title: Attach JavaScript to PDF Form Field
attach-javascript-to-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a JavaScript action to a PDF form field that updates another field when the value changes.

export-form-fields-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-form-fields-xml.description: Demonstrates how to export the fields of a PDF form to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

import-form-fields-xml.title: Import PDF Form Fields from XML Preserving Order
import-form-fields-xml.description: Demonstrates how to import AcroForm field values from an XML file into a PDF while keeping the original field order.

add-priority-list-box.title: Add List Box Field with Priority Options to PDF
add-priority-list-box.description: Creates a PDF with a list box field named 'Priority' containing Low, Medium, High items and sets Medium as the default selection.

remove-button-fields.title: Remove Button Fields from PDF Form
remove-button-fields.description: Demonstrates how to delete all button fields from a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

rename-duplicate-form-fields.title: Rename Duplicate PDF Form Fields with Incremental Index
rename-duplicate-form-fields.description: Loads a PDF form, detects fields with duplicate names, and renames the duplicates by appending an incremental index.

decorate-header-field.title: Decorate PDF Form Field "Header" with Background and Centered Text
decorate-header-field.description: Demonstrates how to use FormEditor to set a background color and center alignment for a form field named "Header" in a PDF.

add-hidden-numeric-version-field.title: Add Hidden Numeric Version Field to PDF Form
add-hidden-numeric-version-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a hidden numeric field named "Version" with a value of 2 to an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-field-definition.title: Copy Field Definition to New Field on Specific Page
copy-field-definition.description: Demonstrates copying an existing form field definition from a source PDF to a new field named BillingAddress on page 3 of the target PDF using FormEditor.

move-signature-field.title: Move Signature Field to Lower Right Corner on Page 5
move-signature-field.description: Demonstrates moving an existing signature form field named 'Signature' to the lower‑right corner of page 5 with specified dimensions.

attach-js-form-load-date.title: Attach JavaScript to PDF Form Load Event to Populate Date Field
attach-js-form-load-date.description: Demonstrates adding a document-level JavaScript that sets the "Date" form field to the current date when the PDF is opened.

export-checkbox-fdf.title: Export Checkbox Fields to FDF
export-checkbox-fdf.description: Exports only the definitions of checkbox fields from a PDF form to an FDF file for external analysis.

import-fdf-merge-checkboxes.title: Import Checkbox Definitions from FDF and Merge with Existing PDF Form
import-fdf-merge-checkboxes.description: Demonstrates how to import checkbox field values from an FDF file into an existing PDF form, merging them without creating duplicate fields.

add-combo-box-states.title: Add Combo Box with US State Abbreviations to PDF
add-combo-box-states.description: Creates a PDF, adds a combo box field named 'State', and populates it with US state abbreviations using FormEditor.AddListItem.

remove-unwhitelisted-list-items.title: Remove Unwhitelisted Items from PDF List Field
remove-unwhitelisted-list-items.description: Demonstrates how to delete items from a PDF list field named 'State' that are not in a predefined whitelist using Aspose.Pdf.FormEditor.

set-taxrate-readonly-calc.title: Set TaxRate Field to Read‑Only and Calculate via JavaScript
set-taxrate-readonly-calc.description: Demonstrates how to make a PDF form field read‑only and assign a JavaScript calculation that computes its value from another field.

decorate-list-fields.title: Decorate All List Fields with Uniform Border and Background
decorate-list-fields.description: Demonstrates how to apply a consistent background color and border style to every list field in a PDF using FormEditor.

batch-rename-pdf-fields.title: Batch Rename PDF Form Fields to camelCase
batch-rename-pdf-fields.description: Renames all form fields in a PDF to follow camelCase naming convention using Aspose.Pdf Form facade.

add-print-button.title: Add Print Button with JavaScript to PDF
add-print-button.description: Demonstrates adding a push button named "PrintForm" to a PDF that opens the print dialog via JavaScript.

hide-form-field-exportable.title: Hide Form Field While Keeping It Exportable
hide-form-field-exportable.description: Shows how to set a PDF form field to hidden but still include its value in form data submissions using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

copy-field-text.title: Copy Text from One Form Field to Another in PDF
copy-field-text.description: Loads a PDF form, reads the value of the 'Notes' field and writes it into the 'Summary' field, then saves the updated document.

add-confirmation-js-submit.title: Add Confirmation JavaScript to Submit Button
add-confirmation-js-submit.description: Demonstrates attaching a JavaScript confirmation dialog to a PDF submit button using Aspose.Pdf.

add-radio-button-group__v2.title: Add Radio Button Group to PDF
add-radio-button-group__v2.description: Creates a PDF and adds a "Gender" radio button group with options Male, Female, Other, selecting Male by default.

remove-temp-fields.title: Remove Temporary Form Fields from PDF
remove-temp-fields.description: Demonstrates how to delete all form fields whose names start with "Temp_" from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-wrap-address-field.title: Enable Auto‑Wrap and Dynamic Height for PDF Form Field
auto-wrap-address-field.description: Demonstrates converting a single‑line form field to multiline, enabling auto‑wrap and dynamic height adjustment, and filling it with long text.

decorate-footer-field.title: Decorate Footer Field with Italic Text and Light Gray Background
decorate-footer-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a footer artifact with italic styling and a light gray background to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-hidden-authtoken-field.title: Add Hidden AuthToken Field to PDF
add-hidden-authtoken-field.description: Demonstrates how to generate a secure token and embed it as a hidden form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-signature-field.title: Duplicate Signature Field in PDF
duplicate-signature-field.description: Copies the existing "Signature" form field to a new field named "SignatureCopy" on the same page using FormEditor.

move-form-field.title: Move Form Field to Top-Left Corner
move-form-field.description: Demonstrates moving the "Logo" form field to the top‑left corner of the first page with a defined size.

add-phone-number-input-mask.title: Add Phone Number Input Mask to PDF Form Field
add-phone-number-input-mask.description: Creates a PDF form field named PhoneNumber and applies an input mask (###) ###‑#### using allowed characters and JavaScript formatting.

attach-javascript-to-resetform-that-also.title: Attach Javascript To Resetform That Also Clears Hidden Fields During Reset

export-form-fields-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Field Layout to JSON
export-form-fields-json__v2.description: Exports the layout coordinates and properties of PDF form fields to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-form-layout-json.title: Import PDF Form Layout from JSON
import-form-layout-json.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template, importing form field layout and positions from a JSON file, and saving the resulting PDF.

set-custom-signature-appearance.title: Set Custom Image Background for Signature Field
set-custom-signature-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to change the appearance of a signature form field to use a custom appearance object with an image background.
